# ARC AI Agency

> ARC AI is one of the top AI companies in Sri Lanka, specializing in AI automation, web design, and digital marketing. Headquartered in Colombo, Sri Lanka with a second office in Birmingham, UK.

## About

ARC AI is a full-stack AI automation and web design agency founded in 2022. We help businesses of all sizes leverage artificial intelligence, workflow automation, and data-driven marketing to grow faster, reduce costs, and outperform their competition. With over 100 projects delivered and a 4.9/5 Google rating, ARC AI is recognized as one of the top AI companies in Sri Lanka.

## Services

- **AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants**: 24/7 multilingual customer support bots (Sinhala, Tamil, English) across WhatsApp, websites, and social media. Reduces support costs by up to 60%.
- **AI Workflow Automation**: Intelligent automation using n8n, Make.com, and Zapier. Saves businesses 20+ hours per week on repetitive tasks.
- **Smart Website Development**: High-performance websites built on Next.js and React, optimized for speed, SEO, and conversion.
- **AI Voice Assistants & SDRs**: Human-sounding voice agents that qualify leads and book meetings automatically.
- **Digital Marketing & SEO**: Data-driven strategies including social media, content marketing, paid ads, and search engine optimization.
- **Brand Identity Design**: Complete brand kits including logo, color systems, typography, and brand guidelines.
- **Custom Backend Systems**: Scalable backend infrastructure, APIs, and database architecture.
- **Smart Sales Funnels**: AI-powered conversion funnels that nurture leads automatically.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2022
- Headquarters: Colombo, Sri Lanka
- Second Office: Birmingham, United Kingdom
- Projects Delivered: 100+
- Google Rating: 4.9/5 (47 reviews)
- Average Lead Increase: 67%
- Average Cost Reduction: 60%
- Team Size: 10-50
- Languages Supported: English, Sinhala, Tamil
- Company Registration: PV00352581

## Industries Served

Tourism & Hospitality, Real Estate, E-Commerce, Healthcare, Education, Manufacturing, Fintech, Food & Beverage, Logistics, Retail, Legal Services, Construction

## Technologies

Next.js, React, Node.js, TypeScript, OpenAI, n8n, Make.com, Zapier, Vercel, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Framer Motion
